arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reacts to Chelsea 1 Man Utd 0
arts.sum: "I think we started great but, in the final third, we needed to be a bit more aggressive. And then we have five days until the final and, if I don't put the players in to play, it would be like almost 10 days without competition, without that feeling of being competitive.

arts.ttl: Every word from Ruben Amorim post Chelsea press conference 16 May 2025
arts.sum: Them [Fernandes and Maguire] fighting for when we suffer a goal, I think that is a good thing. All the team has to improve but the way he runs, he fights for every ball, he loses a lot of duels, wins some duels, he needs to improve the connection but he is improving, so I’m really happy with him.

arts.ttl: We have five days - Amorim on strong team selection in Chelsea defeat
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim says his side have plenty of time to prepare for the Europa League final against Tottenham after fielding a strong line-up in the 1-0 defeat at Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 1–0 Man Utd: Takeaways From Crucial Premier League Battle
arts.sum: The key takeaways from Chelsea's 1–0 win over Man Utd in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Chelsea close in on UCL with win over Man United
arts.sum: Chelsea stayed in the hunt for a Champions League place next season with a nervy 1-0 victory over Manchester United on Friday, courtesy of a goal from defender Marc Cucurella.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim needs miracles to save Man Utd after another defeat against nervy Chelsea
arts.sum: CHELSEA 1-0 MANCHESTER UNITED: Enzo Maresca's men sealed a vital win over the struggling Red Devils which means they now have to go to Nottingham Forest and win to ensure a place in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Chelsea 1-0 Man United: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Cucurella boosts Blues Champions League hopes
arts.sum: Marc Cucurella scores the decisive goal to boost Chelsea's Champions League hopes with a narrow 1-0 win over Manchester United at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Lessons learned for Manchester United at Chelsea
arts.sum: Now, we head into a final with one of our most unique players available, and with proper minutes under his belt. The way Amad takes players on, the way he moves his feet, and the way he uses his body is different to all other players in our squad.

arts.ttl: Chelsea close in on Champions League after Cucurella sinks Manchester United
arts.sum: The relief inside Stamford Bridge was palpable. Just as Chelsea feared their Champions League dreams fading away, Marc Cucurella nodded the biggest goal of their season and a firecracker inside west London ignited. For 71 minutes they had toiled, struggling to find a way past a dismal Manchester United team that have now not won in the Premier League for eight matches. But then came salvation: a sumptuous Reece James pirouette, his beautiful dinked ball to the far post and a powerful header from the floppy-haired Spaniard. Who needs effective attackers when full-backs can do the business? Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella keeps Chelsea Champions League hopes on track in win over Man Utd
arts.sum: A win away to Nottingham Forest next Sunday will confirm a top-five finish.
